texto: Sorry Johnny." "Sorry for what " "For shouting at you. It's just that when I think about the future I keep panicking. It's like falling from the top of the stairs in the dark not knowing where I'll end up." He put his arm around my shoulders. "I understand. Life is precarious for most of us but more so for you. What you forget is what most of your friends see in you." "What's that " "The ability to beat the odds..." "And fall on my feet " He nodded. "I just hope that lasts." "It will Catkin it will. It wouldn't dare fail you.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Julia Golding: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “Sorry Johnny." "Sorry for what " "For shouting at you. It's just that when I think about the futu…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amizade, future, esperanca pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e reflexao-noturna.

texto: The Fourth Crown Princess of the blue Cresent Islands had sixteen rituals to observe from the moment of waking to when she broke her fast.
